commit_metadata.message:
Wire real email delivery and harden auth/API endpoints.

Registration now sends verification via Resend or SMTP, login requires a verified email, and public legal redirects plus consistent API errors keep the flow usable.

commit_metadata.message:
Wire real email delivery and harden auth/API endpoints.

Registration now sends verification via Resend or SMTP, login requires a verified email, and public legal redirects plus consistent API errors keep the flow usable.

Use mallanet.org as canonical email sender for VTA.

Align defaults, deploy env, legal contacts, and docs with the verified Resend domain while keeping the site on venezuelateayuda.org.

commit_metadata.message:
Place diaspora helpers on real country coords and add admin activity logs.

Map "En el exterior" pins from country text instead of the Caribbean anchor, and record IP/UA for register, login, and moderation in the admin panel.

Replace fake avatars with uploads and consistent crop.

Drop pravatar placeholders for initials, add profile photo upload with persistent storage, and keep register/login gated until admin approval.

Fix edge HAProxy config and VTA deploy migrate flow.

Use HAProxy 2.9 ssl_sni syntax, drop broken caps, stop port conflicts, and run migrate as one-off before app up.

commit_metadata.message:
Initial commit: Venezuela Te Ayuda platform.

Mapa de ayuda mutua con registro verificado, directorio de profesionales, mapa embebido en home y chat interno.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

Replace fake avatars with uploads and consistent crop.

Drop pravatar placeholders for initials, add profile photo upload with persistent storage, and keep register/login gated until admin approval.

feat: logo, analytics, footer y mejoras del mapa de ayuda

Agrega branding (logo), Google Analytics, footer estilo Mallanet,
paleta azul y mejoras en fichas, mapa y cantidad/modalidad de ayuda.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

Fix orphan unverified accounts and add password recovery.

Allow re-registering unverified emails with a fresh verification mail, and add forgot/reset password flows that also verify the email when needed.

Fix edge HAProxy config and VTA deploy migrate flow.

Use HAProxy 2.9 ssl_sni syntax, drop broken caps, stop port conflicts, and run migrate as one-off before app up.

tignore`. You almost never want to commit these files to your repository.

## Loading Environment Variables

Next.js has built-in support for loading environment variables from `.env*` files into `process.env`.

```txt filename=".env"
DB_HOST=localhost
DB_
snippet.after:
```

<PagesOnly>

This loads `process.env.DB_HOST`, `process.env.DB_USER`, and `process.env.DB_PASS` into the Node.js environment automatically allowing you to use them in [Next.js data fetching methods](/docs/pages/building-your-application/data-fetching)

commit_metadata.message:
Fix edge HAProxy config and VTA deploy migrate flow.

Use HAProxy 2.9 ssl_sni syntax, drop broken caps, stop port conflicts, and run migrate as one-off before app up.
